Rowan.memorable_quote: Pray if you must, but keep your eyes on the horizon. The heavens won't farm our wheat.
Every disaster is a lesson. Every blessing is a reward. We must align perfectly with the divine will.
I have seen too many floods to believe in mercy. We survive because we yield.

Aldric.memorable_quote: The end draws near! We are punished for our sins, and only suffering will cleanse us.
The divine tests us to see how we treat each other in the dark. Protect the weak above all else.
The heavens demand sacrifice, and as their chosen voice, I demand absolute obedience.

Tomas.memorable_quote: Give me enough stone and I will build a wall that even the gods cannot break.
If we don't try something entirely new, we die. It is that simple.
They're coming for us. The water, the fire, the unseen. Reinforce everything.

Martha.memorable_quote: You cannot eat prayers. Lock the granaries and let the weak starve if they must.
The land provides if we listen to it. We must not anger the soil by forcing our will.
Why stop at surviving? We must claim more land, plant more seeds, and conquer this valley.

Elric.memorable_quote: A disaster for the farmers is a boom for the grain merchants. Prices go up tomorrow.
We cannot survive alone in the dark. If we open our borders, the caravans will save us.
The council makes the rules, but coin makes the reality. I can get you what you need, for a price.
